JCS
PERSONAL
487

Subject: RE: Next steps further
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
Peter – thank you for this and for your earlier reporting and thoughts, really helpful. 
FS has been on the road this week (NATO) so it’s been great to be able to pass on 
your notes, I know they’ve been helpful as he’s been talking to counterparts.
And just received this week’s letter from America- thank you!
Caroline Hurndall │PPS/FS │ 
The Foreign Secretary’s box deadline is midday, Monday to Thursday. Please allow a 
minimum of 48hrs to process work sent to FSPO. Please also copy 
 to 
all submissions/updates to the Foreign Secretary.
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Peter Mandelson <
> 
Sent: 04 April 2025 16:21
To: Oliver Robbins <
>; Caroline Hurndall <
>
Cc: James Roscoe <
>; Mungo Woodifield <
>
Subject: FW: Next steps further
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE
From: Peter Mandelson 
Sent: 04 April 2025 11:20
To: Morgan McSweeney <
>; Varun Chandra 
<
>; Ailsa Terry (No.10) <
>
Subject: Next steps further
I haven’t seen full read out of the call this morning but it’s pretty clear 
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
Personal
JCS
***
488


In the meantime, we will be undertaking our own assessment of the 
implications for the UK economy and the consultation with business and the 
call for evidence has already started. The important point for Britain is to do 
everything possible 
• The immediate need is to control the information flow out of Whitehall. We
must get our version of events out before others do, including those who have
always been sceptical about the possibility of a deal.
Peter
Lord Mandelson
HM Ambassador, Washington DC
 | 
Personal
Personal
***
***
489

Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
